overall.description: A first-person walk through a modern cultural center plaza in a game engine, starting at an outdoor cafe, moving through covered colonnades and past water features, ending at a scenic overlook with a panoramic city view.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at an outdoor cafe with patrons seated under large umbrellas. The camera moves forward past dining tables toward a modern building entrance, passing a security guard, and enters a covered colonnade with massive concrete columns.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered colonnade with massive concrete pillars, the scene transitions from the building entrance to an open plaza. The overhead pedestrian bridge becomes visible, and the reflecting pool appears in the distance as the camera approaches the colonnade exit.

approaching large metal sculpture in the plaza center

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a bright open plaza, the camera walks alongside a long reflecting pool with outdoor seating. The scene features modern sculptures including a prominent spiky metal structure, with trees and additional seating areas visible as the camera moves toward a building passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: building passage leading to scenic overlook

events.description: entering narrow passage between stone buildings
ascending stairs toward the overlook terrace
emerging onto open overlook with panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: walking up stairs through a narrow passage between buildings to reach a scenic overlook with city views

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a narrow passage between stone buildings, ascends stairs, and emerges onto an overlook terrace. Two people stand at the railing photographing the panoramic city skyline and distant mountains that dominate the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling outdoor cafe through a structured architectural complex, eventually emerging onto a high scenic overlook. It begins by gliding past patrons under large umbrellas and a security guard before entering a covered colonnade defined by massive concrete columns. As the camera moves through the pillars, the space opens up to reveal an overhead pedestrian bridge and a distant reflecting pool. The scene then expands into a bright open plaza, where the camera walks alongside the water and past spiky metal sculptures and greenery toward a narrow building passage. Finally, the path ascends a set of stairs to an overlook terrace, where people stand at a railing facing a panoramic city skyline and distant mountains.
